scripts.bundle:run: databricks bundle run octopus -t octopus-ai --profile octopus-ai
scripts.bundle:bootstrap: databricks bundle run bootstrap_job -t octopus-ai --profile octopus-ai
scripts.app:assemble: rm -rf databricks/app/_stage /tmp/octopus-bundle-src && mkdir -p databricks/app/_stage /tmp/octopus-bundle-src && cp -R apps/web/.next/standalone/. /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/ && mkdir -p /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/apps/web/.next/static && cp -R apps/web/.next/static/. /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/apps/web/.next/static/ && mkdir -p /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/apps/web/public && (cp -R apps/web/public/. /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/apps/web/public/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/apps/web/prompts && (cp -R apps/web/prompts/. /tmp/octopus-bundle-src/apps/web/prompts/ 2>/dev/null || true) && STAGE_ABS=$(pwd)/databricks/app/_stage && cd /tmp/octopus-bundle-src && tar -czf - apps node_modules | split -b 9m - "${STAGE_ABS}/bundle.part." && cd - && rm -rf /tmp/octopus-bundle-src && cp databricks/app/app.yaml databricks/app/_stage/app.yaml && cp databricks/app/.databricksignore databricks/app/_stage/.databricksignore
scripts.deploy:databricks: bun run build && bun run app:assemble && bun run bundle:deploy && bun run bundle:run
